## EasyCrypter

EasyCrypter is the crypter that is being sold via an automated bot on Telegram. The crypter uses a method known as "mutation", which involves replacing instructions in the file with their analogues or a sequence of instructions that yield the same outcome as the original code. EasyCrypter supports a maximum file size of 5MB and is only applicable for x86 .NET/Native files.

* * *
